import requests

base_url = "http://localhost:37223"

# 获取更多文章详情
resp = requests.post(
    f"{base_url}/rss/articles",
    json={"max_results": 10},
    timeout=10
)

if resp.status_code == 200:
    data = resp.json()
    articles = data.get('articles', [])
    
    # 打印所有文章标题和摘要
    for i, art in enumerate(articles):
        print(f"\n=== Article {i+1} ===")
        print(f"Title: {art.get('title', 'N/A')}")
        print(f"Summary: {art.get('summary', 'N/A')}")
        print(f"Category: {art.get('category', 'N/A')}")
